Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:20世紀日本の政治家]] [[ar:Category:سياسيون يابانيون في القرن 20]] [[ary:Category:سياسي جاپوني ف لقرن 20]] [[azb:Category:۲۰. یوز ایلده ژاپونلو سیاستچیلر]] [[bn:Category:২০শ শতাব্দীর জাপানি রাজনীতিবিদ]] [[cy:Category:Gwleidyddion yr 20fed ganrif o Japan]] [[es:Category:Políticos de Japón del siglo XX]] [[fa:Category:سیاستمداران سده ۲۰ (میلادی) اهل ژاپن]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité politique japonaise du XXe siècle]] [[it:Category:Politici giapponesi del XX secolo]] [[pt:Category:Políticos japoneses do século XX]] [[ru:Category:Политики Японии XX века]] [[sv:Category:Japanska politiker under 1900-talet]] [[tr:Category:20. yüzyıl Japon siyasetçileri]] [[ur:Category:بیسویں صدی کے جاپانی سیاست دان]] [[vi:Category:Chính khách Nhật Bản thế kỷ 20]] [[zh:Category:20世紀日本政治人物]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:清浦奎吾]].

==Revision (2025-05-16T01:17:00Z): (Bot: update category metadata)== [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:20世紀日本の政治家]] [[ar:Category:سياسيون يابانيون في القرن 20]] [[ary:Category:سياسي جاپوني ف لقرن 20]] [[azb:Category:۲۰. یوز ایلده ژاپونلو سیاستچیلر]] [[bn:Category:২০শ শতাব্দীর জাপানি রাজনীতিবিদ]] [[cy:Category:Gwleidyddion yr 20fed ganrif o Japan]] [[es:Category:Políticos de Japón del siglo XX]] [[fa:Category:سیاستمداران سده ۲۰ (میلادی) اهل ژاپن]] [[fr:Category:Personnalité politique japonaise du XXe siècle]] [[it:Category:Politici giapponesi del XX secolo]] [[pt:Category:Políticos japoneses do século XX]] [[ru:Category:Политики Японии XX века]] [[sv:Category:Japanska politiker under 1900-talet]] [[tr:Category:20. yüzyıl Japon siyasetçileri]] [[ur:Category:بیسویں صدی کے جاپانی سیاست دان]] [[vi:Category:Chính khách Nhật Bản thế kỷ 20]] [[zh:Category:20世紀日本政治人物]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:清浦奎吾]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking

Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"

Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9682653)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=20th-century_Japanese_politicians here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
